perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A person wearing a large red cardboard costume shaped like a vintage rotary phone acts out a skit, with their face visible through the dial center. (2) A still image of an actual red classic rotary phone is shown. (3) A fast-paced montage shows raw materials: green and blue plastic basins, a cardboard box, and black spiral hair ties. (4) A young woman with pink hair and glasses is shown cutting cardboard and painting a background. (5) The woman applies red face paint as part of her costume makeup. (6) The finished costume is displayed; the person spins the dial, picks up the 'receiver' (made of red-painted basins), and poses with lights flashing inside the costume.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched female vocals shouting 'Wei~' repeatedly followed by a question in Mandarin. (2) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music enters with strong rhythmic percussion. (3) Sound effects of a classic telephone ringing and mechanical clicking from a rotary dial are heard. (4) Brief ambient sound of cardboard being moved and items being dropped on a floor. (5) Music continues with a consistent rhythm through the final reveal.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '喂~喂~喂~ 請問是中情局嗎?' (Hello, is this the CIA?) - humorous tone. (2) Functional Text: '你看過這種電話嗎?' (Have you seen this kind of phone?) - questioning tone. (3) Decorative Text: '#好' (Good) - small caption sticker.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook Skit -> DIY Construction Montage -> Final Costume Reveal

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator with pink hair
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with bright pink hair, glasses, wearing a black tank top during the construction phase and a large red cardboard phone costume for the result.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor room with beige paper backdrops, a yellow wall clock, and various DIY tools/materials spread out.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light supplemented by indoor ceiling lights

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a creative and humorous DIY project where the creator builds an oversized, functional-looking vintage rotary phone costume from everyday items like plastic basins and cardboard.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Pink hair of the creator, elaborate cardboard craftsmanship
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast editing and beat-syncing to make the manual labor of DIY construction appear energetic and entertaining.
